messages.content:
The makeup exam rules are as follows:  
1. **Re-evaluations**: Students may apply for a re-evaluation within 7 days of result declaration, provided they pay the prescribed fee.  
2. **Make-up Exams**: For students who missed the ESE (presumably the exam) due to approved medical emergencies or extreme circumstances, make-up exams are scheduled within 2 weeks of the regular exam end.  

These rules are explicitly stated in the retrieved context.

Hello! I'm the College Multi-Agent Assistant, here to support your academic and collaborative needs. As part of the college's multi-agent system, I work alongside various agents to assist with tasks, provide guidance, and enhance your experience. Feel free to ask me anything related to your studies, projects, or support needs! 😊
